chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4678 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.19564/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 3. For order on Misc. No.19565/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.19566/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 30.9.2025 Mr. Ghulam Akbar Dharejo advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Petitioners are police officials, who have been booked in FIR No.384 of 2025, registered under Sections 382, 342, 337-A(i), 504, 34 PPC at Police Station Liaquatabad, Karachi Central. When they approached the Court as accused, according to learned counsel for the petitioners, they are attacked by the legal community. SSP Karachi South is directed to ensure that the petitioners may appear before the concerned Court for pre-arrest bail without any interference. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SHO City Court Police Station, Karachi and the SSP Karachi South, for compliance. This petition is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
